creator: michael.hmich@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alex S from comment #7)
both reports are basically the same issue, since they are older they could be ignored, this here is the latest state of the problem

I can't help with EFI_STAGING_SIZE, I don't know

there isn't a mixed system involved, this report is still valid for 13-stable, OS and Kernel, as a couple of days ago, it's also valid for pkg AND ports nvidia 390, as well as the x11 nvidia 390 driver

I also repeat, these GT7xx cards are on Nvidia's supported HW list for the 390 driver, which is included with the driver package, they work fine on Linux latest kernel

the NVidia freebsd + Linux driver from NVidia's site isn't compiling on Freebsd, while the fbsd nvidia 340 pkg and port, also the x11 driver, are working fine

I also do not know if it is really necessary to spend time with this problem because the 340 driver works fine without trouble since the 390 driver stopped working, but then there should be an advice, or at least taking it out of the supported hw list 


never give up your hope, I also hope I'll never see "EFI" again  :) 

cheers
